title: udisks2 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[2.9.4-12.0.1]
- Enable btrfs support for OL supported arches [Orabug: 37464632]

[2.9.4-12]
- udiskslinuxmanager: Add lower bounds check to fd_index (CVE-2025-8067) (RHEL-109413)
full_text:
[2.9.4-12.0.1]
- Enable btrfs support for OL supported arches [Orabug: 37464632]

[2.9.4-12]
- udiskslinuxmanager: Add lower bounds check to fd_index (CVE-2025-8067) (RHEL-109413)
